title: Algorithms & Complexity
description: Understand Big O notation, time/space complexity analysis, and standard sorting/searching algorithms.
learningObjectives: Read and write Big O notation for time and space complexities
Analyze sequential loop execution time parameters
Compare search complexities: O(N) linear search vs O(log N) binary search

sections.title: Big O Notation and Scalability
sections.content: Big O notation measures algorithm scaling relative to input size (N). In game loops running at 60 FPS, execution budgets are tight (~16.6ms per frame). An O(N^2) double-loop (like basic particle collision tests) will quickly cause frame rate hitching as entity count rises. Optimizing these to O(N log N) or O(N) via spatial division is mandatory for AAA scale.

sections.title: Binary Search (O(log N))
